table_name: Measured Condition Input - HV Switchgear (GM) - Primary: Partial Discharge

columns.original: Condition Criteria: Partial Discharge Test Results

rows.description: Low or negligible levels of partial discharge indicating no issues identified (e.g. a green condition using a TEV or <10% of manufacturers recommendation
Some moderate levels of partial discharge recorded (e.g. ‘Amber’ result from TEV measuring device or between 10% and 30% of the manufacturers recommendation)
High levels of partial discharge indicating possible defect with plant / equipment, requiring further investigation (e.g. ‘Red’ result from TEV measuring device or above manufacturers recommendation)
High partial discharge. Source of partial discharge confirmed as potential source of failure
